name: API Test Automation Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  workflow_dispatch:  # Allows manual trigger

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Postman API Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          
      - name: Install Newman and Reporters
        run: |
          npm install -g newman
          npm install -g newman-reporter-html
          npm install -g newman-reporter-htmlextra

      - name: List Files (Debug)
        run: |
          echo "Current directory:"
          pwd
          echo "Files in directory:"
          ls -la
          echo "Looking for collection and environment files..."
          find . -name "*.postman_collection.json" -o -name "*.json" | head -10

      - name: Run Postman Tests
        id: run-tests
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          # Try to find collection and environment files
          COLLECTION_FILE=$(find . -name "*.postman_collection.json" | head -1)
          ENV_FILE=$(find . -name "*.postman_environment.json" | head -1)
          DATA_FILE=$(find . -name "*.csv" -o -name "*.json" | grep -v "postman_environment" | head -1)
          
          if [ -z "$COLLECTION_FILE" ]; then
            echo "❌ No Postman collection file found!"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "✅ Found collection: $COLLECTION_FILE"
          
          # Build command
          CMD="newman run \"$COLLECTION_FILE\""
          
          if [ ! -z "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
            echo "✅ Found environment: $ENV_FILE"
            CMD="$CMD -e \"$ENV_FILE\""
          fi
          
          if [ ! -z "$DATA_FILE" ]; then
            echo "✅ Found data file: $DATA_FILE"
            CMD="$CMD -d \"$DATA_FILE\""
          fi
          
          # Add reporters and options
          CMD="$CMD --reporters cli,html,htmlextra"
          CMD="$CMD --reporter-html-export test-results.html"
          CMD="$CMD --reporter-htmlextra-export htmlextra-report.html"
          CMD="$CMD --color on"
          
          echo "🚀 Running command: $CMD"
          eval $CMD

      - name: Upload Test Results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            *.html
            newman/
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Check Test Status
        if: steps.run-tests.outcome == 'failure'
        run: |
          echo "❌ API Tests Failed!"
          exit 1
